title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Haier India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Haier India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Haier India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haier India Holdings Services:
Haier India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
